name: Ming

skills.name: Good Omens
skills.description: Every 5s, Ming's next Basic Attack deals more magical damage and heals himself and the linked teammate. The healing is reduced if the enemy is nota hero.

skills.name: Time - Carefree
skills.description: Forms a link with the target. When linked to an ally, increases the Physical and Magical Attack Movement Speed, and Attack Speed of both parties. When linked to an enemy unit, reduces their Physical and Magical Attack while dealing damage over time.

skills.name: Mastery - Glide
skills.description: Switches the effect of the link. When linked to an ally, increases the Physical and Magical Defense of both parties. When linked to an enemy unit, reduces their Physical and Magical Defense. The effect can beswitched repeatedly.

skills.name: Peace - Longevity
skills.description: While linked, can spend own Health to restore an equal amount of Health toallies or deal an equal amount of damage to enemies. Recovers Health continuously while out of combat.

tips: Ming is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 49.9% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Tranquility → Breakthrough Robe → Savant's Wrath → Augur's Word → Succubus Cloak.
Run Fate for stats that match Ming's Support kit. Take Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Time - Carefree → Mastery - Glide → Peace - Longevity → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
Ming excels into Cirrus, Menki, Wuyan. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.
Ming sits at Tier B globally (49.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Ming good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Ming is Tier B Support with 49.9% win rate, 0.5% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Ming build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Tranquility, Breakthrough Robe, Savant's Wrath, Augur's Word, Succubus Cloak. Run Fate arcana with Heal. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Ming?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying into Ming. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Ming completes core items. Ming struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Ming counter?
faqs.answer: Ming is strong into Cirrus, Menki, Wuyan according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Ming when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Ming good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Ming sits at Tier B globally (49.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Ming play?
faqs.answer: Ming is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Ming?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Heal. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Ming or Dolia — which is better?
faqs.answer: Ming vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Ming has +3.9% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Ming when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Ming?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Support picks unless targeting a one-trick.
